title: abutilon periplocifolium var. zeylanicum
intro: Abutilon periplocifolium var. zeylanicum, also known as Velvet Abutilon, is a plant species native to Sri Lanka, belonging to the Malvaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Velvet Abutilon include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. The plant can be prepared as a herbal infusion, decoction, or tincture, making it a valuable addition to traditional medicine practices.
